programs.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programs.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complicated murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).
